pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + SLOT + Brotli — 1.1088 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA and CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels, widens the MLP, and offsets Huffman budget via Hessian-driven mixed int5/int6 quant plus Brotli and SLOT eval.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward for MLP
Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 per-matrix quantization to free capacity
SLOT eval delta tuning with LR-floor warmdown
